source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Grandmaster Ninja
upgrades.description: Throws incredibly fast, 8 shurikens per shot!

upgrades.name: Distraction
upgrades.description: Some Bloons will become distracted and move backwards.

upgrades.name: Counter-Espionage
upgrades.description: Ninja attacks can strip camo from Bloons they damage.

upgrades.name: Shinobi Tactics
upgrades.description: Increases attack speed and pierce of nearby Ninjas. Stacks 20 times.

upgrades.name: Bloon Sabotage
upgrades.description: Sabotage ability: Lasts 15 seconds. During the sabotage, all Bloons move at half speed.

upgrades.name: Grand Saboteur
upgrades.description: Ability duration is longer and buffs Shinobi while active, and MOAB-Class Bloons spawn with less health during the sabotage.

upgrades.name: Seeking Shuriken
upgrades.description: Increases attack range and shurikens will seek out and pop Bloons automatically.

upgrades.name: Caltrops
upgrades.description: Throws out spiked caltrops onto the track nearby.

upgrades.name: Flash Bomb
upgrades.description: Combination attack! Alternates flash bombs that stun many Bloons and shuriken deal increased damage to stunned targets.

upgrades.name: Sticky Bomb
upgrades.description: Throws powerful timed charges at MOAB-Class Bloons.
